rule: hit = (kw>=2) OR (sem>=0.7) OR (func>=0.7); independent per-result scoring; total_hits across 8 results; threshold_for_fail=1
candidate_summary: BESSEMER-BLAST: structured covariance-targeted Layer-0 noise injection during pretraining on a 3-stage reactivity-ordered schedule (Si-phase spurious-surface features -> Mn-phase syntactic overfitting -> C-phase factual overconfidence) with decreasing sigma; recombines (a) structured covariance-targeted noise + (b) 3-stage reactivity-ordered schedule + (c) fixed Layer-0 injection.

results_analysis.title: Cyclical loss-based optimization for pretraining LLMs on noisy data
results_analysis.note: Cyclical schedule of noisy-data selection during pretraining; structured variation in training signal directly parallels staged noise schedule.

results_analysis.title: Light-weight Fine-tuning Defending Adversarial Noise (RAN)
results_analysis.note: Rectifies upstream adversarial noise; same upstream-noise-cleanup paradigm as Bessemer impurity removal cascade.

results_analysis.title: RobustFormer: Noise-Robust Pre-training
results_analysis.note: Noise-robust pretraining; kw and semantic match even though functional differs (DWT attention mechanism).

results_analysis.title: Continual Pre-training on Character-level Noisy Texts
results_analysis.note: Artificial character-noise pretraining for perturbation robustness with staged corruption; same forced-noise-during-pretraining concept.

results_analysis.title: Progressive Layer Dropping
results_analysis.note: Curriculum-based temporal schedule for pretraining stability; kw and semantic hit even though functional cluster differs (layer dropping not noise targeting).

results_analysis.title: Filtering Pretraining Data Builds Tamper-Resistant Safeguards
results_analysis.note: Mentions structured noise discrimination during pretraining; kw threshold met though semantic/functional below 0.7.

results_analysis.title: NEVLP Noise-Robust Vision-Language Pre-training
results_analysis.note: Noise-robust pretraining (VL); kw count meets threshold.

results_analysis.title: Curriculum Learning Multi-Modal Contrastive Masked Autoencoders
results_analysis.note: Curriculum-staged masking during pretraining; kw threshold met.

verdict_sentence: BESSEMER-BLAST fails the novelty bar: 8/8 retrieved results trigger at least one hit criterion (8 keyword hits, 5 semantic hits >= 0.70, 3 functional hits >= 0.70 across distinct effect clusters including cyclical noisy-data selection, adversarial-noise rectification, and continual noisy-text pretraining), well above the threshold_for_fail=1, confirming structured/staged noise injection during pretraining is prior art.
